# nullcloud_bucket (Resource)

Manages a NullCloud object storage bucket.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "nullcloud_bucket" "example" {
  name   = "my-bucket"
  region = "us-east-1"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Name of the bucket.

### Optional

- `region` (String) Region where the bucket is created. Defaults to us-east-1.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String)
- `crn` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `status` (String)
